def positive_textbook_docstring_small_helper():
    rule_id = "textbook_docstring_small_helper"
    family = "ai_smells"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Very small helper functions that have unusually long, textbook-style docstrings."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
